steps.prompt: Every letter is made of shapes — lines, curves, and circles! Find l — it's just one straight line going down!
steps.feedback: A straight line! That shape is inside b, d, h, k, and lots more. Now find c — it's a curve!
A curve — like a smile on its side! That shape is inside a, d, e, g, and q too. Now find o — it's a full circle!
A circle — all the way round! Lines, curves, and circles — those three shapes make every letter. You're ready to write!
